scene_title: Testemunha militar em silhueta diante de camera antiga
narrative_beat: Silhueta masculina de costas diante de tripe com camera vintage 16mm — testemunho gravado

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: broad-shouldered masculine silhouette shot from behind, wearing an ochre cloak over partial military uniform, facing a tripod with a vintage 16mm film camera
subject.focal_point: the black camera lens reflecting a single golden pinpoint of light
subject.secondary: Face not visible. Shoulders imposing. The ochre cloak glows warm while the rest of the scene recedes into shadow.

environment.location: dim interrogation-style chamber with concrete walls
environment.time_of_day: interior night, single amber key light

composition.rule: offset lateral with negative space toward camera
composition.foreground: cloaked figure silhouette in rich ochre-crimson

lighting.key_light: single warm amber light from lower-right catching the cloak
lighting.fill_light: faint cold backlight on concrete wall
lighting.rim_light: gold edge along shoulder and lens

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only
faces hidden in shadow or turned away

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
